Minesweeper Solver - 8x8 board, 10 mines

View Code (38167 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;

public static class Program
{
    private const long MassiveBoardCellThreshold = 6_000_000;
    private const long MassiveUnknownThreshold = 1_500_000;
    private const long MassiveClueThreshold = 1_500_000;

    public static void Main()
    {
        var reader = new StreamReader(Console.OpenStandardInput(), Encoding.ASCII, false, 1 << 20);
        string header = reader.ReadLine();
        if (header == null)
        {
            return;
        }

        ParseHeader(header, out int height, out int width);

        var board = new string[height];
        long unknownCount = 0;
        long clueCount = 0;

        for (int y = 0; y < height; y++)
        {
            string line = reader.ReadLine() ?? string.Empty;
            if (line.Length < width)
            {
                line = line.PadRight(width, ' ');
            }
            else if (line.Length > width)
            {
                line = line.Substring(0, width);
            }

            board[y] = line;

            for (int x = 0; x < width; x++)
            {
                char ch = line[x];
                if (ch == ' ')
                {
                    unknownCount++;
                }
                else if (IsClue(ch))
                {
                    clueCount++;
                }
            }
        }

        var writer = new StreamWriter(Console.OpenStandardOutput(), Encoding.ASCII, 1 << 20);

        bool useMassiveMode =
            (long)height * width >= MassiveBoardCellThreshold ||
            unknownCount >= MassiveUnknownThreshold ||
            clueCount >= MassiveClueThreshold;

        if (!useMassiveMode)
        {
            try
            {
                var advanced = new AdvancedSolver(board, height, width);
                advanced.Solve();
                advanced.WriteOutput(writer);
                writer.Flush();
                return;
            }
            catch (TooLargeForAdvancedException)
            {
                useMassiveMode = true;
            }
        }

        if (useMassiveMode)
        {
            var safeCells = new MassiveSolver(board, height, width).Solve();
            writer.WriteLine(safeCells.Count);
            foreach (long key in safeCells)
            {
                writer.Write(UnpackX(key));
                writer.Write(' ');
                writer.WriteLine(UnpackY(key));
            }
        }

        writer.Flush();
    }

    private static void ParseHeader(string header, out int height, out int width)
    {
        int i = 0;
        while (i < header.Length && header[i] == ' ')
        {
            i++;
        }

        int value = 0;
        while (i < header.Length && header[i] >= '0' && header[i] <= '9')
        {
            value = value * 10 + (header[i] - '0');
            i++;
        }

        height = value;

        while (i < header.Length && header[i] == ' ')
        {
            i++;
        }

        value = 0;
        while (i < header.Length && header[i] >= '0' && header[i] <= '9')
        {
            value = value * 10 + (header[i] - '0');
            i++;
        }

        width = value;
    }

    private static bool IsClue(char ch)
    {
        return ch >= '0' && ch <= '8';
    }

    private static long Pack(int x, int y)
    {
        return ((long)y << 32) | (uint)x;
    }

    private static int UnpackX(long key)
    {
        return (int)(key & 0xFFFFFFFF);
    }

    private static int UnpackY(long key)
    {
        return (int)(key >> 32);
    }

    private sealed class TooLargeForAdvancedException : Exception
    {
    }

    private sealed class MassiveSolver
    {
        private readonly string[] board;
        private readonly int height;
        private readonly int width;
        private readonly HashSet<long> safe = new HashSet<long>();
        private readonly HashSet<long> mine = new HashSet<long>();
        private readonly HashSet<long> activeClues = new HashSet<long>();
        private readonly List<long> activeBuffer = new List<long>();

        public MassiveSolver(string[] board, int height, int width)
        {
            this.board = board;
            this.height = height;
            this.width = width;
        }

        public HashSet<long> Solve()
        {
            for (int y = 0; y < height; y++)
            {
                string row = board[y];
                for (int x = 0; x < width; x++)
                {
                    if (IsClue(row[x]))
                    {
                        EvaluateClue(x, y);
                    }
                }
            }

            while (activeClues.Count > 0)
            {
                activeBuffer.Clear();
                foreach (long key in activeClues)
                {
                    activeBuffer.Add(key);
                }

                activeClues.Clear();

                for (int i = 0; i < activeBuffer.Count; i++)
                {
                    long key = activeBuffer[i];
                    EvaluateClue(UnpackX(key), UnpackY(key));
                }
            }

            return safe;
        }

        private void EvaluateClue(int x, int y)
        {
            int clue = board[y][x] - '0';
            Span<long> unresolved = stackalloc long[8];
            int unresolvedCount = 0;
            int knownMines = 0;

            int minY = y > 0 ? y - 1 : 0;
            int maxY = y + 1 < height ? y + 1 : height - 1;
            int minX = x > 0 ? x - 1 : 0;
            int maxX = x + 1 < width ? x + 1 : width - 1;

            for (int ny = minY; ny <= maxY; ny++)
            {
                string row = board[ny];
                for (int nx = minX; nx <= maxX; nx++)
                {
                    if (nx == x && ny == y)
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    char ch = row[nx];
                    if (ch == '*')
                    {
                        knownMines++;
                        continue;
                    }

                    if (ch != ' ')
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    long key = Pack(nx, ny);
                    if (mine.Contains(key))
                    {
                        knownMines++;
                    }
                    else if (!safe.Contains(key))
                    {
                        unresolved[unresolvedCount++] = key;
                    }
                }
            }

            int remaining = clue - knownMines;
            if (remaining < 0 || remaining > unresolvedCount || unresolvedCount == 0)
            {
                return;
            }

            if (remaining == 0)
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < unresolvedCount; i++)
                {
                    AssignSafe(unresolved[i]);
                }
            }
            else if (remaining == unresolvedCount)
            {
                for (int i = 0; i < unresolvedCount; i++)
                {
                    AssignMine(unresolved[i]);
                }
            }
        }

        private void AssignSafe(long key)
        {
            if (safe.Add(key))
            {
                MarkAdjacentCluesActive(UnpackX(key), UnpackY(key));
            }
        }

        private void AssignMine(long key)
        {
            if (mine.Add(key))
            {
                MarkAdjacentCluesActive(UnpackX(key), UnpackY(key));
            }
        }

        private void MarkAdjacentCluesActive(int x, int y)
        {
            int minY = y > 0 ? y - 1 : 0;
            int maxY = y + 1 < height ? y + 1 : height - 1;
            int minX = x > 0 ? x - 1 : 0;
            int maxX = x + 1 < width ? x + 1 : width - 1;

            for (int ny = minY; ny <= maxY; ny++)
            {
                string row = board[ny];
                for (int nx = minX; nx <= maxX; nx++)
                {
                    if (IsClue(row[nx]))
                    {
                        activeClues.Add(Pack(nx, ny));
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private sealed class AdvancedSolver
    {
        private const int AdvancedVariableCap = 1_500_000;
        private const int AdvancedConstraintCap = 1_500_000;
        private const int SubsetVariableLimit = 160_000;
        private const int SubsetConstraintLimit = 80_000;
        private const int SubsetPairLimit = 500_000;
        private const int ExactVariableBudget = 2_000;
        private const int ExactComponentVariableLimit = 24;
        private const int ExactComponentConstraintLimit = 64;
        private const int ExactNodeBudget = 50_000;

        private readonly string[] board;
        private readonly int height;
        private readonly int width;

        private readonly List<int[]> constraints = new List<int[]>();
        private int[] remaining = Array.Empty<int>();
        private int[] unresolved = Array.Empty<int>();
        private int[] varX = Array.Empty<int>();
        private int[] varY = Array.Empty<int>();
        private int[] varAdjStart = Array.Empty<int>();
        private int[] varAdjItems = Array.Empty<int>();
        private byte[] status = Array.Empty<byte>();
        private bool[] queued = Array.Empty<bool>();
        private Queue<int> queue = new Queue<int>();

        public AdvancedSolver(string[] board, int height, int width)
        {
            this.board = board;
            this.height = height;
            this.width = width;
        }

        public void Solve()
        {
            Build();

            queued = new bool[constraints.Count];
            queue = new Queue<int>(constraints.Count);

            for (int c = 0; c < constraints.Count; c++)
            {
                Enqueue(c);
            }

            PropagateQueue();

            bool allowSubset = varX.Length <= SubsetVariableLimit && constraints.Count <= SubsetConstraintLimit;
            bool allowExact = varX.Length > 0;
            int exactBudget = ExactVariableBudget;

            for (int round = 0; round < 8; round++)
            {
                bool changed = false;

                if (allowSubset && RunSubsetReasoning())
                {
                    changed = true;
                    PropagateQueue();
                }

                if (allowExact && exactBudget > 0 && RunExactComponents(ref exactBudget))
                {
                    changed = true;
                    PropagateQueue();
                }

                if (!changed)
                {
                    break;
                }
            }
        }

        public void WriteOutput(StreamWriter writer)
        {
            int safeCount = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < status.Length; i++)
            {
                if (status[i] == 1)
                {
                    safeCount++;
                }
            }

            writer.WriteLine(safeCount);
            for (int i = 0; i < status.Length; i++)
            {
                if (status[i] == 1)
                {
                    writer.Write(varX[i]);
                    writer.Write(' ');
                    writer.WriteLine(varY[i]);
                }
            }
        }

        private void Build()
        {
            var idByCell = new Dictionary<long, int>(1024);
            var xList = new List<int>(1024);
            var yList = new List<int>(1024);
            var degreeList = new List<int>(1024);
            var remainingList = new List<int>(1024);

            for (int y = 0; y < height; y++)
            {
                string row = board[y];
                for (int x = 0; x < width; x++)
                {
                    char ch = row[x];
                    if (!IsClue(ch))
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    int[] vars = new int[8];
                    int count = 0;
                    int fixedMines = 0;

                    int minY = y > 0 ? y - 1 : 0;
                    int maxY = y + 1 < height ? y + 1 : height - 1;
                    int minX = x > 0 ? x - 1 : 0;
                    int maxX = x + 1 < width ? x + 1 : width - 1;

                    for (int ny = minY; ny <= maxY; ny++)
                    {
                        string neighborRow = board[ny];
                        for (int nx = minX; nx <= maxX; nx++)
                        {
                            if (nx == x && ny == y)
                            {
                                continue;
                            }

                            char neighbor = neighborRow[nx];
                            if (neighbor == '*')
                            {
                                fixedMines++;
                                continue;
                            }

                            if (neighbor != ' ')
                            {
                                continue;
                            }

                            long key = Pack(nx, ny);
                            if (!idByCell.TryGetValue(key, out int id))
                            {
                                id = xList.Count;
                                idByCell.Add(key, id);
                                xList.Add(nx);
                                yList.Add(ny);
                                degreeList.Add(0);
                                if (xList.Count > AdvancedVariableCap)
                                {
                                    throw new TooLargeForAdvancedException();
                                }
                            }

                            vars[count++] = id;
                        }
                    }

                    if (count == 0)
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    int[] constraintVars = new int[count];
                    for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
                    {
                        int id = vars[i];
                        constraintVars[i] = id;
                        degreeList[id]++;
                    }

                    constraints.Add(constraintVars);
                    remainingList.Add((ch - '0') - fixedMines);

                    if (constraints.Count > AdvancedConstraintCap)
                    {
                        throw new TooLargeForAdvancedException();
                    }
                }
            }

            varX = xList.ToArray();
            varY = yList.ToArray();
            status = new byte[varX.Length];
            remaining = remainingList.ToArray();
            unresolved = new int[constraints.Count];

            varAdjStart = new int[varX.Length + 1];
            for (int i = 0; i < degreeList.Count; i++)
            {
                varAdjStart[i + 1] = varAdjStart[i] + degreeList[i];
            }

            varAdjItems = new int[varAdjStart[varAdjStart.Length - 1]];
            int[] offsets = (int[])varAdjStart.Clone();

            for (int c = 0; c < constraints.Count; c++)
            {
                int[] vars = constraints[c];
                unresolved[c] = vars.Length;
                for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
                {
                    int id = vars[i];
                    varAdjItems[offsets[id]++] = c;
                }
            }
        }

        private void Enqueue(int constraint)
        {
            if (!queued[constraint])
            {
                queued[constraint] = true;
                queue.Enqueue(constraint);
            }
        }

        private bool Assign(int variable, byte value)
        {
            byte current = status[variable];
            if (current != 0)
            {
                return false;
            }

            status[variable] = value;

            for (int p = varAdjStart[variable]; p < varAdjStart[variable + 1]; p++)
            {
                int constraint = varAdjItems[p];
                unresolved[constraint]--;
                if (value == 2)
                {
                    remaining[constraint]--;
                }

                Enqueue(constraint);
            }

            return true;
        }

        private bool PropagateQueue()
        {
            bool changed = false;

            while (queue.Count > 0)
            {
                int constraint = queue.Dequeue();
                queued[constraint] = false;

                int minesLeft = remaining[constraint];
                int varsLeft = unresolved[constraint];
                if (varsLeft == 0 || minesLeft < 0 || minesLeft > varsLeft)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                int[] vars = constraints[constraint];
                if (minesLeft == 0)
                {
                    for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
                    {
                        if (status[vars[i]] == 0 && Assign(vars[i], 1))
                        {
                            changed = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
                else if (minesLeft == varsLeft)
                {
                    for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
                    {
                        if (status[vars[i]] == 0 && Assign(vars[i], 2))
                        {
                            changed = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            return changed;
        }

        private bool RunSubsetReasoning()
        {
            var seenPairs = new HashSet<long>();
            bool changed = false;
            int pairCount = 0;

            for (int variable = 0; variable < status.Length; variable++)
            {
                if (status[variable] != 0)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                int[] localConstraints = new int[8];
                int localCount = 0;

                for (int p = varAdjStart[variable]; p < varAdjStart[variable + 1]; p++)
                {
                    int constraint = varAdjItems[p];
                    if (unresolved[constraint] > 0)
                    {
                        localConstraints[localCount++] = constraint;
                    }
                }

                for (int i = 0; i < localCount; i++)
                {
                    for (int j = i + 1; j < localCount; j++)
                    {
                        int a = localConstraints[i];
                        int b = localConstraints[j];
                        if (a > b)
                        {
                            int temp = a;
                            a = b;
                            b = temp;
                        }

                        long key = ((long)a << 32) | (uint)b;
                        if (!seenPairs.Add(key))
                        {
                            continue;
                        }

                        pairCount++;
                        if (pairCount > SubsetPairLimit)
                        {
                            return changed;
                        }

                        if (TryApplySubset(a, b))
                        {
                            changed = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            return changed;
        }

        private bool TryApplySubset(int first, int second)
        {
            Span<int> a = stackalloc int[8];
            Span<int> b = stackalloc int[8];
            int countA = GetUnresolvedVars(first, a);
            int countB = GetUnresolvedVars(second, b);

            if (countA == 0 || countB == 0)
            {
                return false;
            }

            if (countA <= countB && IsSubset(a, countA, b, countB))
            {
                return ApplyDifference(a, countA, remaining[first], b, countB, remaining[second]);
            }

            if (countB < countA && IsSubset(b, countB, a, countA))
            {
                return ApplyDifference(b, countB, remaining[second], a, countA, remaining[first]);
            }

            return false;
        }

        private int GetUnresolvedVars(int constraint, Span<int> buffer)
        {
            int count = 0;
            int[] vars = constraints[constraint];
            for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
            {
                int variable = vars[i];
                if (status[variable] == 0)
                {
                    buffer[count++] = variable;
                }
            }

            return count;
        }

        private static bool IsSubset(Span<int> small, int smallCount, Span<int> big, int bigCount)
        {
            for (int i = 0; i < smallCount; i++)
            {
                bool found = false;
                int value = small[i];
                for (int j = 0; j < bigCount; j++)
                {
                    if (big[j] == value)
                    {
                        found = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }

                if (!found)
                {
                    return false;
                }
            }

            return true;
        }

        private static bool Contains(Span<int> values, int count, int target)
        {
            for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
            {
                if (values[i] == target)
                {
                    return true;
                }
            }

            return false;
        }

        private bool ApplyDifference(Span<int> subset, int subsetCount, int subsetMines, Span<int> superset, int supersetCount, int supersetMines)
        {
            int diffCount = supersetCount - subsetCount;
            int diffMines = supersetMines - subsetMines;
            if (diffCount <= 0 || diffMines < 0 || diffMines > diffCount)
            {
                return false;
            }

            byte forced;
            if (diffMines == 0)
            {
                forced = 1;
            }
            else if (diffMines == diffCount)
            {
                forced = 2;
            }
            else
            {
                return false;
            }

            bool changed = false;
            for (int i = 0; i < supersetCount; i++)
            {
                int variable = superset[i];
                if (!Contains(subset, subsetCount, variable) && status[variable] == 0 && Assign(variable, forced))
                {
                    changed = true;
                }
            }

            return changed;
        }

        private bool RunExactComponents(ref int exactBudget)
        {
            bool changed = false;
            var visitedVar = new bool[status.Length];
            var visitedConstraint = new bool[constraints.Count];
            var frontier = new List<int>(64);

            for (int root = 0; root < status.Length && exactBudget > 0; root++)
            {
                if (status[root] != 0 || visitedVar[root])
                {
                    continue;
                }

                frontier.Clear();
                frontier.Add(root);
                visitedVar[root] = true;

                var componentVars = new List<int>(16);
                var componentConstraints = new List<int>(16);

                for (int index = 0; index < frontier.Count; index++)
                {
                    int variable = frontier[index];
                    componentVars.Add(variable);

                    for (int p = varAdjStart[variable]; p < varAdjStart[variable + 1]; p++)
                    {
                        int constraint = varAdjItems[p];
                        if (unresolved[constraint] == 0)
                        {
                            continue;
                        }

                        if (!visitedConstraint[constraint])
                        {
                            visitedConstraint[constraint] = true;
                            componentConstraints.Add(constraint);
                        }

                        int[] vars = constraints[constraint];
                        for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
                        {
                            int other = vars[i];
                            if (status[other] == 0 && !visitedVar[other])
                            {
                                visitedVar[other] = true;
                                frontier.Add(other);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                if (componentVars.Count == 0 ||
                    componentVars.Count > ExactComponentVariableLimit ||
                    componentConstraints.Count > ExactComponentConstraintLimit ||
                    componentVars.Count > exactBudget)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                exactBudget -= componentVars.Count;

                var localIndex = new Dictionary<int, int>(componentVars.Count);
                for (int i = 0; i < componentVars.Count; i++)
                {
                    localIndex[componentVars[i]] = i;
                }

                int[][] localConstraintVars = new int[componentConstraints.Count][];
                int[] localRemaining = new int[componentConstraints.Count];
                int[] localUnresolved = new int[componentConstraints.Count];
                int[] localDegree = new int[componentVars.Count];
                bool valid = true;

                for (int c = 0; c < componentConstraints.Count; c++)
                {
                    int globalConstraint = componentConstraints[c];
                    int[] temp = new int[8];
                    int count = 0;
                    int[] vars = constraints[globalConstraint];

                    for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
                    {
                        int globalVar = vars[i];
                        if (status[globalVar] == 0)
                        {
                            temp[count++] = localIndex[globalVar];
                        }
                    }

                    if (remaining[globalConstraint] < 0 || remaining[globalConstraint] > count)
                    {
                        valid = false;
                        break;
                    }

                    int[] localVars = new int[count];
                    for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
                    {
                        int localVar = temp[i];
                        localVars[i] = localVar;
                        localDegree[localVar]++;
                    }

                    localConstraintVars[c] = localVars;
                    localRemaining[c] = remaining[globalConstraint];
                    localUnresolved[c] = count;
                }

                if (!valid)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                var tempAdj = new List<int>[componentVars.Count];
                for (int i = 0; i < tempAdj.Length; i++)
                {
                    tempAdj[i] = new List<int>(4);
                }

                for (int c = 0; c < localConstraintVars.Length; c++)
                {
                    int[] vars = localConstraintVars[c];
                    for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
                    {
                        tempAdj[vars[i]].Add(c);
                    }
                }

                int[][] localVarToConstraints = new int[componentVars.Count][];
                for (int i = 0; i < componentVars.Count; i++)
                {
                    localVarToConstraints[i] = tempAdj[i].ToArray();
                }

                var exact = new ExactComponentSolver(
                    localConstraintVars,
                    localRemaining,
                    localUnresolved,
                    localVarToConstraints,
                    localDegree,
                    ExactNodeBudget);

                ExactResult result = exact.Solve();
                if (!result.Completed || result.FixedStates == null)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                byte[] fixedStates = result.FixedStates;
                for (int i = 0; i < fixedStates.Length; i++)
                {
                    byte value = fixedStates[i];
                    if (value != 0 && Assign(componentVars[i], value))
                    {
                        changed = true;
                    }
                }
            }

            return changed;
        }
    }

    private readonly struct ExactResult
    {
        public ExactResult(bool completed, byte[] fixedStates)
        {
            Completed = completed;
            FixedStates = fixedStates;
        }

        public bool Completed { get; }
        public byte[] FixedStates { get; }
    }

    private sealed class ExactComponentSolver
    {
        private readonly int[][] constraintVars;
        private readonly int[] initialRemaining;
        private readonly int[] initialUnresolved;
        private readonly int[][] varToConstraints;
        private readonly int[] varDegree;
        private readonly int nodeBudget;

        private int nodes;
        private bool overBudget;
        private bool stopEarly;
        private bool hasSolution;
        private int fixedCandidateCount;
        private byte[] intersection;

        public ExactComponentSolver(
            int[][] constraintVars,
            int[] initialRemaining,
            int[] initialUnresolved,
            int[][] varToConstraints,
            int[] varDegree,
            int nodeBudget)
        {
            this.constraintVars = constraintVars;
            this.initialRemaining = initialRemaining;
            this.initialUnresolved = initialUnresolved;
            this.varToConstraints = varToConstraints;
            this.varDegree = varDegree;
            this.nodeBudget = nodeBudget;
        }

        public ExactResult Solve()
        {
            Search(
                new byte[varToConstraints.Length],
                (int[])initialRemaining.Clone(),
                (int[])initialUnresolved.Clone());

            if (!hasSolution || overBudget)
            {
                return new ExactResult(false, null);
            }

            return new ExactResult(true, intersection);
        }

        private void Search(byte[] assignment, int[] remaining, int[] unresolved)
        {
            if (overBudget || stopEarly)
            {
                return;
            }

            nodes++;
            if (nodes > nodeBudget)
            {
                overBudget = true;
                return;
            }

            if (!Propagate(assignment, remaining, unresolved))
            {
                return;
            }

            int branchVariable = SelectBranchVariable(assignment, unresolved);
            if (branchVariable < 0)
            {
                RecordSolution(assignment);
                return;
            }

            bool preferMine = PreferMine(branchVariable, remaining, unresolved);

            if (preferMine)
            {
                Branch(assignment, remaining, unresolved, branchVariable, 2);
                Branch(assignment, remaining, unresolved, branchVariable, 1);
            }
            else
            {
                Branch(assignment, remaining, unresolved, branchVariable, 1);
                Branch(assignment, remaining, unresolved, branchVariable, 2);
            }
        }

        private void Branch(byte[] assignment, int[] remaining, int[] unresolved, int variable, byte value)
        {
            if (overBudget || stopEarly)
            {
                return;
            }

            byte[] nextAssignment = (byte[])assignment.Clone();
            int[] nextRemaining = (int[])remaining.Clone();
            int[] nextUnresolved = (int[])unresolved.Clone();

            if (Apply(nextAssignment, nextRemaining, nextUnresolved, variable, value))
            {
                Search(nextAssignment, nextRemaining, nextUnresolved);
            }
        }

        private bool Apply(byte[] assignment, int[] remaining, int[] unresolved, int variable, byte value)
        {
            byte current = assignment[variable];
            if (current != 0)
            {
                return current == value;
            }

            assignment[variable] = value;
            int[] affectedConstraints = varToConstraints[variable];

            for (int i = 0; i < affectedConstraints.Length; i++)
            {
                int constraint = affectedConstraints[i];
                unresolved[constraint]--;
                if (value == 2)
                {
                    remaining[constraint]--;
                }

                if (remaining[constraint] < 0 || remaining[constraint] > unresolved[constraint])
                {
                    return false;
                }
            }

            return true;
        }

        private bool Propagate(byte[] assignment, int[] remaining, int[] unresolved)
        {
            bool changed;
            do
            {
                changed = false;

                for (int constraint = 0; constraint < constraintVars.Length; constraint++)
                {
                    int minesLeft = remaining[constraint];
                    int varsLeft = unresolved[constraint];
                    if (minesLeft < 0 || minesLeft > varsLeft)
                    {
                        return false;
                    }

                    if (varsLeft == 0)
                    {
                        continue;
                    }

                    if (minesLeft == 0 || minesLeft == varsLeft)
                    {
                        byte forced = minesLeft == 0 ? (byte)1 : (byte)2;
                        int[] vars = constraintVars[constraint];
                        for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
                        {
                            int variable = vars[i];
                            if (assignment[variable] == 0)
                            {
                                if (!Apply(assignment, remaining, unresolved, variable, forced))
                                {
                                    return false;
                                }

                                changed = true;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            while (changed);

            return true;
        }

        private int SelectBranchVariable(byte[] assignment, int[] unresolved)
        {
            int bestConstraint = -1;
            int bestConstraintSize = int.MaxValue;

            for (int constraint = 0; constraint < constraintVars.Length; constraint++)
            {
                int varsLeft = unresolved[constraint];
                if (varsLeft > 1 && varsLeft < bestConstraintSize)
                {
                    bestConstraintSize = varsLeft;
                    bestConstraint = constraint;
                }
            }

            if (bestConstraint >= 0)
            {
                int bestVariable = -1;
                int bestDegree = -1;
                int[] vars = constraintVars[bestConstraint];
                for (int i = 0; i < vars.Length; i++)
                {
                    int variable = vars[i];
                    if (assignment[variable] == 0 && varDegree[variable] > bestDegree)
                    {
                        bestDegree = varDegree[variable];
                        bestVariable = variable;
                    }
                }

                if (bestVariable >= 0)
                {
                    return bestVariable;
                }
            }

            for (int variable = 0; variable < assignment.Length; variable++)
            {
                if (assignment[variable] == 0)
                {
                    return variable;
                }
            }

            return -1;
        }

        private bool PreferMine(int variable, int[] remaining, int[] unresolved)
        {
            int bestBias = int.MinValue;
            bool preferMine = false;
            int[] affectedConstraints = varToConstraints[variable];

            for (int i = 0; i < affectedConstraints.Length; i++)
            {
                int constraint = affectedConstraints[i];
                int varsLeft = unresolved[constraint];
                if (varsLeft <= 0)
                {
                    continue;
                }

                int minesLeft = remaining[constraint];
                int bias = Math.Abs((minesLeft << 1) - varsLeft);
                if (bias > bestBias)
                {
                    bestBias = bias;
                    preferMine = (minesLeft << 1) > varsLeft;
                }
            }

            return preferMine;
        }

        private void RecordSolution(byte[] assignment)
        {
            if (!hasSolution)
            {
                hasSolution = true;
                intersection = (byte[])assignment.Clone();
                fixedCandidateCount = 0;
                for (int i = 0; i < intersection.Length; i++)
                {
                    if (intersection[i] != 0)
                    {
                        fixedCandidateCount++;
                    }
                }

                return;
            }

            for (int i = 0; i < intersection.Length; i++)
            {
                if (intersection[i] != 0 && intersection[i] != assignment[i])
                {
                    intersection[i] = 0;
                    fixedCandidateCount--;
                }
            }

            if (fixedCandidateCount == 0)
            {
                stopEarly = true;
            }
        }
    }
}

Test 15: Tetrahedron Shadow Covering (Rust) Score: 11.00 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are solving a Shadow Covering problem with tetrahedrons in Rust.

**The Challenge:**
Your program will be tested with polygons ranging from simple shapes to very complex geometries.
The same program must work efficiently across ALL scales.

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: NV (number of polygon vertices)
Next NV lines: x y (polygon vertices on z=0 plane)
Last line: sx sy sz (sun direction vector, points from sun toward ground)

**Output format (stdout):**
Line 1: count (number of tetrahedrons)
Next count lines: px py pz qw qx qy qz scale
px,py,pz: center position
qw,qx,qy,qz: rotation quaternion (w is scalar)
scale: uniform scale factor

**Standard Tetrahedron Reference:**
Vertices (before transform):
[1.0, 0.0, -0.707]
[-1.0, 0.0, -0.707]
[0.0, 1.0, 0.707]
[0.0, -1.0, 0.707]

**Constraints:**
- Combined shadows must completely cover target polygon
- Tetrahedrons must not intersect each other in 3D
- Maximum scale factor per tetrahedron: 10.0
- Minimize number of tetrahedrons

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler:**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

Be aware that default warnings are enabled and will cause a compilation failure,
so ensure that you write warning-free code.

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main() function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

View chain of thought

Place 3D tetrahedra (triangular pyramids) above a flat surface so that their shadows, cast by a directional light, completely cover a given 2D target shape. Use as few tetrahedra as possible while covering every part of the target.

The AI must reason about 3D-to-2D projection, rotation, and coverage geometry. Subpasses use more complex target shapes and trickier light angles. The baseline uses a simple grid of tetrahedra above the target.

[3x3 square, sun straight down] 100% coverage with 2 tetrahedrons, Time: 0.0s

Shadow Covering - 3x3 square, sun straight down

View Code (18506 chars)
use std::cmp::Ordering;
use std::fmt::Write as _;
use std::io::{self, Read};

const EPS: f64 = 1.0e-9;
const NEWTON_EPS: f64 = 1.0e-10;
const MAX_SCALE: f64 = 10.0;
const MAX_EDGE: f64 = 2.0 * MAX_SCALE;
const TETRA_HEIGHT_FACTOR: f64 = 0.816_496_580_927_726; // sqrt(2/3)
const STACK_GAP: f64 = 1.0;
const MAX_DEPTH: u32 = 64;

const REF_VERTS: [Vec3; 4] = [
    Vec3::new(1.0, 0.0, -0.707_106_781_186_547_6),
    Vec3::new(-1.0, 0.0, -0.707_106_781_186_547_6),
    Vec3::new(0.0, 1.0, 0.707_106_781_186_547_6),
    Vec3::new(0.0, -1.0, 0.707_106_781_186_547_6),
];

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
struct Vec2 {
    x: f64,
    y: f64,
}

impl Vec2 {
    const fn new(x: f64, y: f64) -> Self {
        Self { x, y }
    }

    fn dot(self, other: Self) -> f64 {
        self.x * other.x + self.y * other.y
    }

    fn cross(self, other: Self) -> f64 {
        self.x * other.y - self.y * other.x
    }

    fn norm_sq(self) -> f64 {
        self.dot(self)
    }

    fn norm(self) -> f64 {
        self.norm_sq().sqrt()
    }
}

impl std::ops::Add for Vec2 {
    type Output = Self;

    fn add(self, rhs: Self) -> Self::Output {
        Self::new(self.x + rhs.x, self.y + rhs.y)
    }
}

impl std::ops::Sub for Vec2 {
    type Output = Self;

    fn sub(self, rhs: Self) -> Self::Output {
        Self::new(self.x - rhs.x, self.y - rhs.y)
    }
}

impl std::ops::Mul<f64> for Vec2 {
    type Output = Self;

    fn mul(self, rhs: f64) -> Self::Output {
        Self::new(self.x * rhs, self.y * rhs)
    }
}

impl std::ops::Div<f64> for Vec2 {
    type Output = Self;

    fn div(self, rhs: f64) -> Self::Output {
        Self::new(self.x / rhs, self.y / rhs)
    }
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
struct Vec3 {
    x: f64,
    y: f64,
    z: f64,
}

impl Vec3 {
    const fn new(x: f64, y: f64, z: f64) -> Self {
        Self { x, y, z }
    }

    fn dot(self, other: Self) -> f64 {
        self.x * other.x + self.y * other.y + self.z * other.z
    }

    fn cross(self, other: Self) -> Self {
        Self::new(
            self.y * other.z - self.z * other.y,
            self.z * other.x - self.x * other.z,
            self.x * other.y - self.y * other.x,
        )
    }

    fn norm_sq(self) -> f64 {
        self.dot(self)
    }

    fn norm(self) -> f64 {
        self.norm_sq().sqrt()
    }

    fn normalized(self) -> Self {
        let len = self.norm();
        if len <= EPS {
            Self::new(0.0, 0.0, 0.0)
        } else {
            self / len
        }
    }
}

impl std::ops::Add for Vec3 {
    type Output = Self;

    fn add(self, rhs: Self) -> Self::Output {
        Self::new(self.x + rhs.x, self.y + rhs.y, self.z + rhs.z)
    }
}

impl std::ops::Sub for Vec3 {
    type Output = Self;

    fn sub(self, rhs: Self) -> Self::Output {
        Self::new(self.x - rhs.x, self.y - rhs.y, self.z - rhs.z)
    }
}

impl std::ops::Mul<f64> for Vec3 {
    type Output = Self;

    fn mul(self, rhs: f64) -> Self::Output {
        Self::new(self.x * rhs, self.y * rhs, self.z * rhs)
    }
}

impl std::ops::Div<f64> for Vec3 {
    type Output = Self;

    fn div(self, rhs: f64) -> Self::Output {
        Self::new(self.x / rhs, self.y / rhs, self.z / rhs)
    }
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct Mat3 {
    m: [[f64; 3]; 3],
}

impl Mat3 {
    fn from_cols(c0: Vec3, c1: Vec3, c2: Vec3) -> Self {
        Self {
            m: [
                [c0.x, c1.x, c2.x],
                [c0.y, c1.y, c2.y],
                [c0.z, c1.z, c2.z],
            ],
        }
    }

    fn transpose(self) -> Self {
        let m = self.m;
        Self {
            m: [
                [m[0][0], m[1][0], m[2][0]],
                [m[0][1], m[1][1], m[2][1]],
                [m[0][2], m[1][2], m[2][2]],
            ],
        }
    }

    fn mul(self, rhs: Self) -> Self {
        let mut out = [[0.0; 3]; 3];
        for (r, row) in out.iter_mut().enumerate() {
            for (c, value) in row.iter_mut().enumerate() {
                *value = self.m[r][0] * rhs.m[0][c]
                    + self.m[r][1] * rhs.m[1][c]
                    + self.m[r][2] * rhs.m[2][c];
            }
        }
        Self { m: out }
    }
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct LiftSolution {
    z1: f64,
    z2: f64,
    edge: f64,
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct TriangleTask {
    verts: [Vec2; 3],
    depth: u32,
}

#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
struct Tetra {
    center: Vec3,
    quat: [f64; 4],
    scale: f64,
    min_dot: f64,
    max_dot: f64,
    min_z: f64,
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input).unwrap();
    let mut tokens = input.split_whitespace();

    let nv = match tokens.next() {
        Some(value) => value.parse::<usize>().unwrap_or(0),
        None => {
            println!("0");
            return;
        }
    };

    let mut polygon = Vec::with_capacity(nv);
    for _ in 0..nv {
        let x = match tokens.next() {
            Some(value) => value.parse::<f64>().unwrap_or(0.0),
            None => {
                println!("0");
                return;
            }
        };
        let y = match tokens.next() {
            Some(value) => value.parse::<f64>().unwrap_or(0.0),
            None => {
                println!("0");
                return;
            }
        };
        polygon.push(Vec2::new(x, y));
    }

    let mut sun = Vec3::new(
        tokens
            .next()
            .and_then(|value| value.parse::<f64>().ok())
            .unwrap_or(0.0),
        tokens
            .next()
            .and_then(|value| value.parse::<f64>().ok())
            .unwrap_or(0.0),
        tokens
            .next()
            .and_then(|value| value.parse::<f64>().ok())
            .unwrap_or(-1.0),
    );

    if polygon.len() < 3 {
        println!("0");
        return;
    }

    if sun.z > 0.0 {
        sun = sun * -1.0;
    }
    if sun.z.abs() < 1.0e-9 {
        sun.z = -1.0e-9;
    }

    let hull = convex_hull(&polygon);
    if hull.len() < 3 || polygon_area_abs(&hull) <= EPS {
        println!("0");
        return;
    }

    let shear = Vec2::new(sun.x / sun.z, sun.y / sun.z);
    let stack_dir = (sun * -1.0).normalized();

    let ref_basis = face_basis(REF_VERTS[0], REF_VERTS[1], REF_VERTS[2]).unwrap();
    let ref_basis_t = ref_basis.transpose();

    let mut work = Vec::with_capacity(hull.len());
    for i in 1..(hull.len() - 1) {
        work.push(TriangleTask {
            verts: [hull[0], hull[i], hull[i + 1]],
            depth: 0,
        });
    }

    let mut tetrahedra = Vec::new();

    while let Some(task) = work.pop() {
        if triangle_area_abs(task.verts) <= EPS {
            continue;
        }

        let solution = solve_equilateral_lift(task.verts, shear);
        let Some(lift) = solution else {
            if task.depth >= MAX_DEPTH {
                continue;
            }
            split_four(task.verts, task.depth + 1, &mut work);
            continue;
        };

        if lift.edge <= MAX_EDGE * (1.0 + 1.0e-8) {
            if let Some(tetra) = build_tetra(task.verts, lift, shear, stack_dir, ref_basis_t) {
                tetrahedra.push(tetra);
            }
            continue;
        }

        if task.depth >= MAX_DEPTH {
            continue;
        }

        let overshoot = lift.edge / MAX_EDGE;
        if overshoot > 2.5 {
            split_four(task.verts, task.depth + 1, &mut work);
        } else {
            split_longest_edge(task.verts, task.depth + 1, &mut work);
        }
    }

    if tetrahedra.is_empty() {
        println!("0");
        return;
    }

    tetrahedra.sort_by(|a, b| {
        a.min_dot
            .partial_cmp(&b.min_dot)
            .unwrap_or(Ordering::Equal)
    });

    let mut current_end = f64::NEG_INFINITY;
    let mut output = String::new();
    writeln!(&mut output, "{}", tetrahedra.len()).unwrap();

    for tetra in tetrahedra {
        let min_shift_for_ground = ((1.0 - tetra.min_z) / stack_dir.z).max(0.0);
        let min_shift_for_separation = if current_end.is_finite() {
            current_end + STACK_GAP - tetra.min_dot
        } else {
            0.0
        };
        let shift = min_shift_for_ground.max(min_shift_for_separation.max(0.0));
        current_end = tetra.max_dot + shift;
        let center = tetra.center + stack_dir * shift;
        writeln!(
            &mut output,
            "{:.10} {:.10} {:.10} {:.10} {:.10} {:.10} {:.10} {:.10}",
            center.x,
            center.y,
            center.z,
            tetra.quat[0],
            tetra.quat[1],
            tetra.quat[2],
            tetra.quat[3],
            tetra.scale
        )
        .unwrap();
    }

    print!("{output}");
}

fn polygon_area_abs(poly: &[Vec2]) -> f64 {
    if poly.len() < 3 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    let mut area = 0.0;
    for i in 0..poly.len() {
        area += poly[i].cross(poly[(i + 1) % poly.len()]);
    }
    0.5 * area.abs()
}

fn triangle_area_abs(tri: [Vec2; 3]) -> f64 {
    ((tri[1] - tri[0]).cross(tri[2] - tri[0])).abs() * 0.5
}

fn convex_hull(points: &[Vec2]) -> Vec<Vec2> {
    let mut pts = points.to_vec();
    pts.sort_by(|a, b| {
        a.x.partial_cmp(&b.x)
            .unwrap_or(Ordering::Equal)
            .then_with(|| a.y.partial_cmp(&b.y).unwrap_or(Ordering::Equal))
    });

    pts.dedup_by(|a, b| (a.x - b.x).abs() <= EPS && (a.y - b.y).abs() <= EPS);
    if pts.len() <= 1 {
        return pts;
    }

    let mut lower: Vec<Vec2> = Vec::with_capacity(pts.len());
    for &p in &pts {
        while lower.len() >= 2 {
            let n = lower.len();
            let cross = (lower[n - 1] - lower[n - 2]).cross(p - lower[n - 1]);
            if cross > EPS {
                break;
            }
            lower.pop();
        }
        lower.push(p);
    }

    let mut upper: Vec<Vec2> = Vec::with_capacity(pts.len());
    for &p in pts.iter().rev() {
        while upper.len() >= 2 {
            let n = upper.len();
            let cross = (upper[n - 1] - upper[n - 2]).cross(p - upper[n - 1]);
            if cross > EPS {
                break;
            }
            upper.pop();
        }
        upper.push(p);
    }

    lower.pop();
    upper.pop();
    lower.extend(upper);
    lower
}

fn solve_equilateral_lift(tri: [Vec2; 3], shear: Vec2) -> Option<LiftSolution> {
    let a = tri[1] - tri[0];
    let b = tri[2] - tri[0];
    let c = tri[2] - tri[1];

    let aa = a.norm_sq();
    let bb = b.norm_sq();
    let cc = c.norm_sq();

    let alpha = a.dot(shear);
    let beta = b.dot(shear);
    let gamma = c.dot(shear);
    let k = 1.0 + shear.norm_sq();

    let tri_scale = aa.max(bb).max(cc).sqrt().max(1.0);
    let seed_scale = tri_scale * (1.0 + shear.norm());

    let mut seeds = vec![
        (0.0, 0.0),
        (tri_scale, 0.0),
        (0.0, tri_scale),
        (tri_scale, tri_scale),
        (-tri_scale, tri_scale),
        (tri_scale, -tri_scale),
        (-tri_scale, -tri_scale),
    ];

    for factor in [0.25, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 4.0, 8.0] {
        let s = seed_scale * factor;
        seeds.push((s, 0.0));
        seeds.push((0.0, s));
        seeds.push((s, s));
        seeds.push((-s, s));
        seeds.push((s, -s));
        seeds.push((-s, -s));
    }

    let mut best_err = f64::INFINITY;
    let mut best = None;

    for (mut u, mut v) in seeds {
        for _ in 0..64 {
            let (f1, f2, d1, d2, d3) = lift_system(aa, bb, cc, alpha, beta, gamma, k, u, v);
            let err = f1.abs().max(f2.abs());
            if err < best_err {
                best_err = err;
                best = Some(LiftSolution {
                    z1: u,
                    z2: v,
                    edge: ((d1 + d2 + d3) / 3.0).sqrt(),
                });
            }

            if err <= NEWTON_EPS {
                return Some(LiftSolution {
                    z1: u,
                    z2: v,
                    edge: ((d1 + d2 + d3) / 3.0).sqrt(),
                });
            }

            let j11 = 2.0 * alpha + 2.0 * k * u;
            let j12 = -2.0 * beta - 2.0 * k * v;
            let j21 = 2.0 * (alpha + gamma + k * v);
            let j22 = -2.0 * (gamma + k * (v - u));
            let det = j11 * j22 - j12 * j21;
            if det.abs() <= 1.0e-12 {
                break;
            }

            let du = (-f1 * j22 + j12 * f2) / det;
            let dv = (j21 * f1 - j11 * f2) / det;
            let mut step = 1.0;
            let mut improved = false;

            for _ in 0..12 {
                let nu = u + du * step;
                let nv = v + dv * step;
                let (nf1, nf2, _, _, _) =
                    lift_system(aa, bb, cc, alpha, beta, gamma, k, nu, nv);
                let next_err = nf1.abs().max(nf2.abs());
                if next_err < err {
                    u = nu;
                    v = nv;
                    improved = true;
                    break;
                }
                step *= 0.5;
            }

            if !improved {
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    if best_err <= 1.0e-7 {
        best
    } else {
        None
    }
}

fn lift_system(
    aa: f64,
    bb: f64,
    cc: f64,
    alpha: f64,
    beta: f64,
    gamma: f64,
    k: f64,
    u: f64,
    v: f64,
) -> (f64, f64, f64, f64, f64) {
    let d1 = aa + 2.0 * alpha * u + k * u * u;
    let d2 = bb + 2.0 * beta * v + k * v * v;
    let w = v - u;
    let d3 = cc + 2.0 * gamma * w + k * w * w;
    let f1 = d1 - d2;
    let f2 = d1 - d3;
    (f1, f2, d1, d2, d3)
}

fn split_four(tri: [Vec2; 3], depth: u32, work: &mut Vec<TriangleTask>) {
    let m01 = (tri[0] + tri[1]) * 0.5;
    let m12 = (tri[1] + tri[2]) * 0.5;
    let m20 = (tri[2] + tri[0]) * 0.5;
    work.push(TriangleTask {
        verts: [tri[0], m01, m20],
        depth,
    });
    work.push(TriangleTask {
        verts: [m01, tri[1], m12],
        depth,
    });
    work.push(TriangleTask {
        verts: [m20, m12, tri[2]],
        depth,
    });
    work.push(TriangleTask {
        verts: [m01, m12, m20],
        depth,
    });
}

fn split_longest_edge(tri: [Vec2; 3], depth: u32, work: &mut Vec<TriangleTask>) {
    let l01 = (tri[1] - tri[0]).norm_sq();
    let l12 = (tri[2] - tri[1]).norm_sq();
    let l20 = (tri[0] - tri[2]).norm_sq();

    if l01 >= l12 && l01 >= l20 {
        let mid = (tri[0] + tri[1]) * 0.5;
        work.push(TriangleTask {
            verts: [tri[0], mid, tri[2]],
            depth,
        });
        work.push(TriangleTask {
            verts: [mid, tri[1], tri[2]],
            depth,
        });
    } else if l12 >= l20 {
        let mid = (tri[1] + tri[2]) * 0.5;
        work.push(TriangleTask {
            verts: [tri[1], mid, tri[0]],
            depth,
        });
        work.push(TriangleTask {
            verts: [mid, tri[2], tri[0]],
            depth,
        });
    } else {
        let mid = (tri[2] + tri[0]) * 0.5;
        work.push(TriangleTask {
            verts: [tri[2], mid, tri[1]],
            depth,
        });
        work.push(TriangleTask {
            verts: [mid, tri[0], tri[1]],
            depth,
        });
    }
}

fn build_tetra(
    tri: [Vec2; 3],
    lift: LiftSolution,
    shear: Vec2,
    stack_dir: Vec3,
    ref_basis_t: Mat3,
) -> Option<Tetra> {
    let p0 = Vec3::new(tri[0].x, tri[0].y, 0.0);
    let p1 = Vec3::new(
        tri[1].x + shear.x * lift.z1,
        tri[1].y + shear.y * lift.z1,
        lift.z1,
    );
    let p2 = Vec3::new(
        tri[2].x + shear.x * lift.z2,
        tri[2].y + shear.y * lift.z2,
        lift.z2,
    );

    let side = ((p1 - p0).norm() + (p2 - p0).norm() + (p2 - p1).norm()) / 3.0;
    if !(side.is_finite() && side > EPS) {
        return None;
    }

    let face_basis_t = face_basis(p0, p1, p2)?;
    let centroid = (p0 + p1 + p2) / 3.0;
    let normal = column(face_basis_t, 2);
    let p3 = centroid - normal * (TETRA_HEIGHT_FACTOR * side);

    let center = (p0 + p1 + p2 + p3) / 4.0;
    let rotation = face_basis_t.mul(ref_basis_t);
    let quat = quat_from_rotation(rotation);
    let scale = side * 0.5;

    if !(scale.is_finite() && scale > 0.0 && scale <= MAX_SCALE * (1.0 + 1.0e-8)) {
        return None;
    }

    let raw_vertices = [p0, p1, p2, p3];
    let mut min_dot = f64::INFINITY;
    let mut max_dot = f64::NEG_INFINITY;
    let mut min_z = f64::INFINITY;
    for v in raw_vertices {
        let d = v.dot(stack_dir);
        min_dot = min_dot.min(d);
        max_dot = max_dot.max(d);
        min_z = min_z.min(v.z);
    }

    Some(Tetra {
        center,
        quat,
        scale,
        min_dot,
        max_dot,
        min_z,
    })
}

fn face_basis(a: Vec3, b: Vec3, c: Vec3) -> Option<Mat3> {
    let e1 = (b - a).normalized();
    if e1.norm_sq() <= EPS {
        return None;
    }
    let ac = c - a;
    let proj = e1 * ac.dot(e1);
    let e2 = (ac - proj).normalized();
    if e2.norm_sq() <= EPS {
        return None;
    }
    let e3 = e1.cross(e2).normalized();
    if e3.norm_sq() <= EPS {
        return None;
    }
    Some(Mat3::from_cols(e1, e2, e3))
}

fn column(m: Mat3, idx: usize) -> Vec3 {
    Vec3::new(m.m[0][idx], m.m[1][idx], m.m[2][idx])
}

fn quat_from_rotation(m: Mat3) -> [f64; 4] {
    let r = m.m;
    let (mut w, mut x, mut y, mut z);
    let trace = r[0][0] + r[1][1] + r[2][2];

    if trace > 0.0 {
        let s = (trace + 1.0).sqrt() * 2.0;
        w = 0.25 * s;
        x = (r[2][1] - r[1][2]) / s;
        y = (r[0][2] - r[2][0]) / s;
        z = (r[1][0] - r[0][1]) / s;
    } else if r[0][0] > r[1][1] && r[0][0] > r[2][2] {
        let s = (1.0 + r[0][0] - r[1][1] - r[2][2]).sqrt() * 2.0;
        w = (r[2][1] - r[1][2]) / s;
        x = 0.25 * s;
        y = (r[0][1] + r[1][0]) / s;
        z = (r[0][2] + r[2][0]) / s;
    } else if r[1][1] > r[2][2] {
        let s = (1.0 + r[1][1] - r[0][0] - r[2][2]).sqrt() * 2.0;
        w = (r[0][2] - r[2][0]) / s;
        x = (r[0][1] + r[1][0]) / s;
        y = 0.25 * s;
        z = (r[1][2] + r[2][1]) / s;
    } else {
        let s = (1.0 + r[2][2] - r[0][0] - r[1][1]).sqrt() * 2.0;
        w = (r[1][0] - r[0][1]) / s;
        x = (r[0][2] + r[2][0]) / s;
        y = (r[1][2] + r[2][1]) / s;
        z = 0.25 * s;
    }

    let len = (w * w + x * x + y * y + z * z).sqrt();
    if len > 0.0 {
        w /= len;
        x /= len;
        y /= len;
        z /= len;
    } else {
        w = 1.0;
        x = 0.0;
        y = 0.0;
        z = 0.0;
    }

    if w < 0.0 {
        [-w, -x, -y, -z]
    } else {
        [w, x, y, z]
    }
}

Test 16: Job-Shop Scheduling (C++) Score: 11.00 / 14
Typical Prompt:
You are solving a Job-Shop Scheduling problem in C++.

You must write a C++ solver that can handle ANY problem size from trivial to extremely large scale:
- **Trivial**: 2-3 jobs, 2-3 machines, 5-10 tasks total
- **Extreme**: 1000+ jobs, 50+ machines, 50k+ tasks total

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: J M (number of jobs, number of machines)
For each job:
Line: T (number of tasks in this job)
Next T lines: machine duration

**Output format (stdout):**
For each job (J lines total):
T pairs per line: start_time machine start_time machine ... (all tasks for that job)

**Example:**
Input:
2 2
2
0 3
1 2
2
1 2
0 4

Output:
0 0 3 1
0 1 5 0

(Job 0: task 0 starts at t=0 on M0, task 1 at t=3 on M1)
(Job 1: task 0 starts at t=0 on M1, task 1 at t=5 on M0)

**Key Constraints:**
1. Each task in a job must run on its specified machine
2. Tasks within a job must execute in order (task i before task i+1)
3. A machine can only run one task at a time
4. Tasks cannot be interrupted once started

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Write complete, compilable C++ code with a main() function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Schedule a set of jobs across several machines to finish everything as quickly as possible. Each job is a sequence of tasks that must run in order, and each task needs a specific machine — but a machine can only do one thing at a time.

This classic factory-scheduling problem is NP-hard. Subpasses increase the number of jobs and machines. The baseline greedily starts whichever task can begin earliest.

 1.0000
[3 jobs, 2 machines] Makespan: 9, Baseline: 12, Time: 0.1s - excellent (≤ baseline)

Job-Shop Scheduling - 3 jobs, 2 machines

View Code (12477 chars)
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstdint>
#include <iostream>
#include <limits>
#include <numeric>
#include <tuple>
#include <utility>
#include <vector>

struct Task {
    int machine = 0;
    std::int64_t duration = 0;
};

struct Instance {
    int job_count = 0;
    int machine_count = 0;
    std::vector<std::vector<Task>> jobs;
    std::vector<std::vector<std::int64_t>> suffix_job_work;
    std::vector<std::int64_t> machine_total_work;
    std::size_t total_tasks = 0;
};

struct Schedule {
    std::vector<std::vector<std::int64_t>> start_times;
    std::int64_t makespan = std::numeric_limits<std::int64_t>::max();
};

static Instance read_instance() {
    Instance inst;
    std::cin >> inst.job_count >> inst.machine_count;
    inst.jobs.assign(inst.job_count, {});
    inst.suffix_job_work.assign(inst.job_count, {});
    inst.machine_total_work.assign(inst.machine_count, 0);

    for (int j = 0; j < inst.job_count; ++j) {
        int task_count = 0;
        std::cin >> task_count;
        inst.jobs[j].resize(task_count);
        for (int k = 0; k < task_count; ++k) {
            Task task;
            std::cin >> task.machine >> task.duration;
            inst.jobs[j][k] = task;
            if (task.machine >= 0 && task.machine < inst.machine_count) {
                inst.machine_total_work[task.machine] += task.duration;
            }
            ++inst.total_tasks;
        }
    }

    for (int j = 0; j < inst.job_count; ++j) {
        const int t = static_cast<int>(inst.jobs[j].size());
        inst.suffix_job_work[j].assign(t + 1, 0);
        for (int k = t - 1; k >= 0; --k) {
            inst.suffix_job_work[j][k] = inst.suffix_job_work[j][k + 1] + inst.jobs[j][k].duration;
        }
    }

    return inst;
}

static Schedule make_empty_schedule(const Instance& inst) {
    Schedule schedule;
    schedule.start_times.resize(inst.job_count);
    for (int j = 0; j < inst.job_count; ++j) {
        schedule.start_times[j].assign(inst.jobs[j].size(), 0);
    }
    schedule.makespan = 0;
    return schedule;
}

static bool is_better(const Schedule& lhs, const Schedule& rhs) {
    return lhs.makespan < rhs.makespan;
}

static bool is_valid(const Instance& inst, const Schedule& schedule) {
    if (static_cast<int>(schedule.start_times.size()) != inst.job_count) {
        return false;
    }

    std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<std::int64_t, std::int64_t>>> machine_intervals(inst.machine_count);

    for (int j = 0; j < inst.job_count; ++j) {
        if (schedule.start_times[j].size() != inst.jobs[j].size()) {
            return false;
        }
        std::int64_t prev_finish = 0;
        for (std::size_t k = 0; k < inst.jobs[j].size(); ++k) {
            const Task& task = inst.jobs[j][k];
            const std::int64_t start = schedule.start_times[j][k];
            if (start < prev_finish) {
                return false;
            }
            const std::int64_t finish = start + task.duration;
            prev_finish = finish;
            if (task.machine < 0 || task.machine >= inst.machine_count) {
                return false;
            }
            machine_intervals[task.machine].push_back({start, finish});
        }
    }

    for (int m = 0; m < inst.machine_count; ++m) {
        auto& intervals = machine_intervals[m];
        std::sort(intervals.begin(), intervals.end());
        for (std::size_t i = 1; i < intervals.size(); ++i) {
            if (intervals[i].first < intervals[i - 1].second) {
                return false;
            }
        }
    }
    return true;
}

struct CandidateKey {
    std::int64_t a = 0;
    std::int64_t b = 0;
    std::int64_t c = 0;
    std::int64_t d = 0;
    int e = 0;
};

static CandidateKey build_key(
    int rule,
    std::int64_t earliest_start,
    std::int64_t remaining_job_work,
    std::int64_t machine_remaining_work,
    std::int64_t duration,
    int job_id
) {
    CandidateKey key;
    switch (rule) {
        case 0:
            key = {earliest_start, -remaining_job_work, -duration, -machine_remaining_work, job_id};
            break;
        case 1:
            key = {earliest_start, -machine_remaining_work, -remaining_job_work, -duration, job_id};
            break;
        case 2:
            key = {-remaining_job_work, earliest_start, -duration, -machine_remaining_work, job_id};
            break;
        default:
            key = {earliest_start, duration, -remaining_job_work, -machine_remaining_work, job_id};
            break;
    }
    return key;
}

static bool key_less(const CandidateKey& lhs, const CandidateKey& rhs) {
    return std::tie(lhs.a, lhs.b, lhs.c, lhs.d, lhs.e) <
           std::tie(rhs.a, rhs.b, rhs.c, rhs.d, rhs.e);
}

static Schedule greedy_schedule(const Instance& inst, int rule) {
    Schedule schedule = make_empty_schedule(inst);
    std::vector<int> next_task(inst.job_count, 0);
    std::vector<std::int64_t> job_ready(inst.job_count, 0);
    std::vector<std::int64_t> machine_ready(inst.machine_count, 0);
    std::vector<std::int64_t> machine_remaining = inst.machine_total_work;

    for (std::size_t scheduled = 0; scheduled < inst.total_tasks; ++scheduled) {
        int best_job = -1;
        CandidateKey best_key;

        for (int j = 0; j < inst.job_count; ++j) {
            const int k = next_task[j];
            if (k >= static_cast<int>(inst.jobs[j].size())) {
                continue;
            }
            const Task& task = inst.jobs[j][k];
            const std::int64_t earliest_start = std::max(job_ready[j], machine_ready[task.machine]);
            const std::int64_t remaining_job_work = inst.suffix_job_work[j][k];
            const std::int64_t machine_remaining_work = machine_remaining[task.machine];
            const CandidateKey key = build_key(
                rule, earliest_start, remaining_job_work, machine_remaining_work, task.duration, j
            );
            if (best_job == -1 || key_less(key, best_key)) {
                best_job = j;
                best_key = key;
            }
        }

        const int k = next_task[best_job];
        const Task& task = inst.jobs[best_job][k];
        const std::int64_t start = std::max(job_ready[best_job], machine_ready[task.machine]);
        const std::int64_t finish = start + task.duration;

        schedule.start_times[best_job][k] = start;
        job_ready[best_job] = finish;
        machine_ready[task.machine] = finish;
        machine_remaining[task.machine] -= task.duration;
        ++next_task[best_job];
        if (finish > schedule.makespan) {
            schedule.makespan = finish;
        }
    }

    return schedule;
}

class ExactSolver {
public:
    ExactSolver(const Instance& instance, Schedule incumbent)
        : inst(instance),
          best(std::move(incumbent)),
          next_task(inst.job_count, 0),
          job_ready(inst.job_count, 0),
          machine_ready(inst.machine_count, 0),
          current(inst.job_count),
          remaining_job(inst.job_count, 0),
          remaining_machine(inst.machine_total_work) {
        for (int j = 0; j < inst.job_count; ++j) {
            current[j].assign(inst.jobs[j].size(), 0);
            remaining_job[j] = inst.suffix_job_work[j].empty() ? 0 : inst.suffix_job_work[j][0];
        }
    }

    Schedule solve() {
        dfs(0, 0);
        return best;
    }

private:
    const Instance& inst;
    Schedule best;
    std::vector<int> next_task;
    std::vector<std::int64_t> job_ready;
    std::vector<std::int64_t> machine_ready;
    std::vector<std::vector<std::int64_t>> current;
    std::vector<std::int64_t> remaining_job;
    std::vector<std::int64_t> remaining_machine;

    std::int64_t lower_bound(std::int64_t current_makespan) const {
        std::int64_t bound = current_makespan;
        for (int j = 0; j < inst.job_count; ++j) {
            bound = std::max(bound, job_ready[j] + remaining_job[j]);
        }
        for (int m = 0; m < inst.machine_count; ++m) {
            bound = std::max(bound, machine_ready[m] + remaining_machine[m]);
        }
        return bound;
    }

    void dfs(std::size_t scheduled_count, std::int64_t current_makespan) {
        if (scheduled_count == inst.total_tasks) {
            if (current_makespan < best.makespan) {
                best.start_times = current;
                best.makespan = current_makespan;
            }
            return;
        }

        if (lower_bound(current_makespan) >= best.makespan) {
            return;
        }

        std::vector<int> candidates;
        candidates.reserve(inst.job_count);
        for (int j = 0; j < inst.job_count; ++j) {
            if (next_task[j] < static_cast<int>(inst.jobs[j].size())) {
                candidates.push_back(j);
            }
        }

        std::sort(candidates.begin(), candidates.end(), [&](int lhs, int rhs) {
            const int kl = next_task[lhs];
            const int kr = next_task[rhs];
            const Task& tl = inst.jobs[lhs][kl];
            const Task& tr = inst.jobs[rhs][kr];
            const std::int64_t est_l = std::max(job_ready[lhs], machine_ready[tl.machine]);
            const std::int64_t est_r = std::max(job_ready[rhs], machine_ready[tr.machine]);
            const CandidateKey key_l = build_key(
                0, est_l, remaining_job[lhs], remaining_machine[tl.machine], tl.duration, lhs
            );
            const CandidateKey key_r = build_key(
                0, est_r, remaining_job[rhs], remaining_machine[tr.machine], tr.duration, rhs
            );
            return key_less(key_l, key_r);
        });

        for (int j : candidates) {
            const int k = next_task[j];
            const Task& task = inst.jobs[j][k];
            const int m = task.machine;
            const std::int64_t old_job_ready = job_ready[j];
            const std::int64_t old_machine_ready = machine_ready[m];
            const std::int64_t old_remaining_job = remaining_job[j];
            const std::int64_t old_remaining_machine = remaining_machine[m];

            const std::int64_t start = std::max(job_ready[j], machine_ready[m]);
            const std::int64_t finish = start + task.duration;

            current[j][k] = start;
            ++next_task[j];
            job_ready[j] = finish;
            machine_ready[m] = finish;
            remaining_job[j] -= task.duration;
            remaining_machine[m] -= task.duration;

            dfs(scheduled_count + 1, std::max(current_makespan, finish));

            remaining_machine[m] = old_remaining_machine;
            remaining_job[j] = old_remaining_job;
            machine_ready[m] = old_machine_ready;
            job_ready[j] = old_job_ready;
            --next_task[j];
        }
    }
};

static Schedule solve_instance(const Instance& inst) {
    if (inst.total_tasks == 0) {
        return make_empty_schedule(inst);
    }

    if (inst.job_count <= 1 || inst.machine_count <= 1) {
        return greedy_schedule(inst, 0);
    }

    Schedule best = greedy_schedule(inst, 0);

    if (inst.total_tasks <= 18 && inst.job_count <= 6 && inst.machine_count <= 6) {
        for (int rule = 1; rule < 4; ++rule) {
            Schedule candidate = greedy_schedule(inst, rule);
            if (is_better(candidate, best)) {
                best = std::move(candidate);
            }
        }
        ExactSolver solver(inst, best);
        return solver.solve();
    }

    int rule_count = 1;
    if (inst.total_tasks <= 10000) {
        rule_count = 4;
    } else if (inst.total_tasks <= 50000) {
        rule_count = 2;
    }

    for (int rule = 1; rule < rule_count; ++rule) {
        Schedule candidate = greedy_schedule(inst, rule);
        if (is_better(candidate, best)) {
            best = std::move(candidate);
        }
    }

    return best;
}

static void write_schedule(const Instance& inst, const Schedule& schedule) {
    for (int j = 0; j < inst.job_count; ++j) {
        for (std::size_t k = 0; k < inst.jobs[j].size(); ++k) {
            if (k > 0) {
                std::cout << ' ';
            }
            std::cout << schedule.start_times[j][k] << ' ' << inst.jobs[j][k].machine;
        }
        std::cout << '\n';
    }
}

int main() {
    std::ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);

    const Instance inst = read_instance();
    Schedule schedule = solve_instance(inst);

    if (!is_valid(inst, schedule)) {
        schedule = greedy_schedule(inst, 0);
    }

    write_schedule(inst, schedule);
    return 0;
}

Test 17: 3D AABB Bin Packing (C#) Score: 0.00 / 8
Typical Prompt:
You are solving a 3D Bin Packing problem with axis-aligned boxes in C#.

Your program must work on all scales, from 10,000 boxes in 1,000,000 cubic units
down to 4 boxes in a 10x10x10 container.

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: N W H D (number of boxes, container width, height, depth)
Next N lines: w h d (box dimensions)

**Output format (stdout):**
Line 1: packed_count
Next packed_count lines: box_index x y z (0-indexed box index and corner position)

**Critical Requirements:**
1. **Scalability**: Your algorithm must adapt based on container size and number of boxes
2. **Performance**: Must complete within 30 seconds even for very large containers
3. **Quality**: Maximize number of boxes packed while ensuring valid placements

**Constraints:**
- Boxes must be entirely within container bounds
- No two boxes may overlap
- Boxes are axis-aligned (no arbitrary rotation, but you may reorder w/h/d)
- Maximize number of boxes packed

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14

Write complete, compilable C# code with a static void Main method.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

View chain of thought

Pack a collection of rectangular boxes into a shipping container, fitting as much total volume in as possible. Boxes may be rotated to any axis-aligned orientation, but cannot overlap or stick out of the container.

This 3D packing problem is NP-hard. Subpasses increase the number and variety of box sizes. The baseline uses a greedy first-fit approach.
